column2: v0.1 Draft
Mobile-first (iOS + Android)
Indonesia — K-12 competition

Students, parents, and schools in Indonesia manage K-12 competition registrations across dozens of fragmented websites — each with different forms, payment methods, and deadlines. This causes missed opportunities, duplicate admin work, and zero visibility into registration status. There is no single trusted platform that aggregates competitions, handles payment, and keeps all stakeholders informed in one place.
Students (Grade 7–12) · Parents · Teachers & School Admins · Competition Organizers · Representatives (v2)
Completed registrations end-to-end (discovery → paid → confirmed) on platform
1,000 completed registrations · 50 active competitions listed · 5 organizer partners onboarded
